title: Big Picture: India-US trade deal
summary:
Main
Will India-US trade deal support the large tanker market? On Monday Trump cut India's tariffs on exports to the US from 50% to 18%. Trump stated that Modi, for his part, had agreed to stop his country's refiners buying Russian oil.

OCR text:
Box 2: North and South American Oil production plans in 2026
Brazil: a new 180k b/d FPSO (FPSO P-79) on the Buzios field this year, plus
ramp-ups to the full 800k b/d nameplate capacity of FPSOs that came online
in 2025. Increased Brazilian exports are likely to go to Asia in 2026.
